Package io.cloudstub.dynamodb

Class CloudStubDynamoDBService

java.lang.Object
io.cloudstub.dynamodb.CloudStubDynamoDBService
All Implemented Interfaces:
CloudStubService
public class CloudStubDynamoDBService extends Object implements CloudStubService
CloudStub service module for Amazon DynamoDB.

The operation set is generated from the AWS DynamoDB Smithy model; AWS SDK v2 drives it with the JSON/X-Amz-Target protocol, so requests carry an X-Amz-Target header (e.g. DynamoDB_20120810.PutItem) and a JSON body, matched by StubRegistrar.registerJsonTargetStub(java.lang.String, java.lang.String).

The table and item operations below are state-backed: each is a StubHandler that reads and writes the shared StateStore, so an item written by PutItem is returned by a later GetItem, Query, or Scan. State is keyed under the dynamodb/ prefix (see DynamoKeys):

  • dynamodb/tables/{name} → table metadata (key schema + description)
  • dynamodb/tables/{name}/items/{id} → a stored item, where id is a digest of the item's primary-key attribute values

An operation that names a table which was never created returns ResourceNotFoundException; recreating an existing table returns ResourceInUseException.

The remaining operations are served from static Handlebars templates in src/main/resources/templates/: they return well-formed but stateless placeholder responses (e.g. UpdateTable, TagResource).

Not simulated: secondary indexes (GSI/LSI queries scan the base table's partition key only), sort-key range conditions on Query (the partition is returned whole), FilterExpression on Query/Scan, conditional writes ( ConditionExpression), atomic counters and set ADD/DELETE update actions, transactions, PartiQL, streams, backups, and provisioned-throughput accounting.

Discovered via ServiceLoader from META-INF/services/io.cloudstub.core.spi.CloudStubService.

  • Method Details

    • serviceId

      public String serviceId()
      Description copied from interface: CloudStubService
      Unique, lowercase identifier for the AWS service this module handles. Used for logging and diagnostic output only — it does not affect routing.
      Specified by:
      serviceId in interface CloudStubService
      Returns:
      service identifier, e.g. "sqs", "secretsmanager", "s3"

    • register

      public void register(CloudStubContext context)
      Description copied from interface: CloudStubService
      Registers all stubs for this service and receives the shared state store. Called exactly once per CloudStub lifecycle, before any test traffic arrives.
      Specified by:
      register in interface CloudStubService
      Parameters:
      context - carries the stub registrar and the shared state store
